name: Spaghetti Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Homemade spaghetti sauce with garlic and basil
1/2 green bell pepper, sliced and lightly sauteed
1/2 red bell pepper, sliced and lightly sauteed
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray or olive oil.
2. Press the spaghetti in the pan to make a crust.
3. Top with sauce, peppers, and cheeses.
4. Bake in a 350 degree oven until warmed through.
